privileged_info_summary: The ground truth measurements for this task are generated using randomized values (np.random.uniform) rather than fixed dataset values. Clinically, a lumbar neural foramen height greater than 15 mm is considered normal, as heights of 15 mm or less are associated with nerve root compression.
